modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble accessing Web Xtender due to authorization error

full_description_text:  
So, the user was trying to log into Xtender. They kept getting this error about the CAS service provider not being authorized. It’s super frustrating because they just want to access the system. They asked for the link too, but the login issue is the main problem here.
short_description: Trouble accessing Web Xtender due to authorization error
description: So, the user was trying to log into Xtender. They kept getting this error about the CAS service provider not being authorized. It’s super frustrating because they just want to access the system. They asked for the link too, but the login issue is the main problem here.
